# shadcn/ui Copilot Reference

This file is a quick internal reference for generating frontend features with shadcn/ui.

## Primary Docs

- Components index: https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/components
- Registry directory: https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/directory

## Common Commands

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add <component-name>
npx shadcn@latest add --all
```

## Recommended Baseline Set

Use this when scaffolding most CRUD/product features:

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add button input label textarea select checkbox switch radio-group card badge dialog sheet dropdown-menu popover tooltip table tabs separator skeleton sonner
```
